name: product_page_3_products_ashwood-shirt-white-oak

observed_strengths.observation: 'We Think You'll Like...' H2 — cross-sell recommendation section present, enabling outfit-building cross-sell (shirt + bottoms)
'Every Item Plants 10 Trees' H2 — consistent mission badge across all three crawled PDPs confirms uniform brand reinforcement at the purchase step

Meta description is PDP-specific: 'Sustainable Womens Ashwood Shirt in White. Our Organic Cotton Button Up Shirt is ethically crafted from Organic Cotton.' — consistent material-specific meta pattern across the catalog

missing_or_weak.observation: No reviews visible in heading structure — unlike the sweatpant and gift code PDPs, the Ashwood Shirt has no review H3 headings; either reviews are absent on this product or they load below the crawl threshold
No H1 visible — same pattern as other PDPs; product title 'Womens Ashwood Shirt' is in the page title but not in an H1 heading
OG title and OG description empty — same sitewide gap

purchase_path_notes: Ashwood Shirt appears to lack reviews in its heading structure — potential evidence gap (reviews may load via JavaScript below the crawl threshold) or actual absence. If truly absent, this would be an inconsistency in review coverage across the catalog.
